subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Your letter was received. You had complained about not receiving a reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید شکایت از عدم جواب نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @unity; oneness of humanity
